title: peucedanum franchetii
intro: Peucedanum franchetii, also known as Franchet's masterwort, is a plant species belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). It has been traditionally used in Eastern medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. Peucedanum franchetii can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote digestion and relieve menstrual cramps.
